ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sub_regions" (
  "sub_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sub-region */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent region */,
  "sub_region_name" TEXT /* Name of the sub-region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sub-region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sex" (
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sex category */,
  "sex_name" TEXT /* Name of the sex category (e.g., Both Sexes, Male, Female) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sex category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "year_ranges" (
  "year_range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year range */,
  "year_range_name" TEXT /* Name of the year range (e.g., 1990-1995, 2010-2015) */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the range */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "migration_rates" (
  "migration_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each migration rate */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "sub_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-region */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sex category */,
  "year_range_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year range */,
  "annual_rate_of_change" REAL /* Annual rate of change of the migrant stock */,
  "migration_count" INTEGER /* Number of migrants */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("migration_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_rates_year_range_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_range_id") REFERENCES year_ranges ("year_range_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_rates_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sex ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_rates_sub_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_region_id") REFERENCES sub_regions ("sub_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refugee_rates" (
  "refugee_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refugee rate */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "sub_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-region */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sex category */,
  "year_range_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year range */,
  "annual_rate_of_change" REAL /* Annual rate of change of the refugee stock */,
  "refugee_count" INTEGER /* Number of refugees */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("refugee_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refugee_rates_sub_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_region_id") REFERENCES sub_regions ("sub_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refugee_rates_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sex ("sex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refugee_rates_year_range_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_range_id") REFERENCES year_ranges ("year_range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "migration_trends" (
  "migration_trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each migration trend */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "sub_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-region */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sex category */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the trend */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the trend */,
  "trend" REAL /* Migration trend value */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("migration_trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_trends_sub_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_region_id") REFERENCES sub_regions ("sub_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_migration_trends_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sex ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "refugee_trends" (
  "refugee_trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each refugee trend */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  "sub_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sub-region */,
  "sex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sex category */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Start year of the trend */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* End year of the trend */,
  "trend" REAL /* Refugee trend value */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("refugee_trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refugee_trends_sub_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("sub_region_id") REFERENCES sub_regions ("sub_region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_refugee_trends_sex_id FOREIGN KEY ("sex_id") REFERENCES sex ("sex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization where the user works */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_viewed" TEXT /* Data that was viewed or downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user generating the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV, Excel) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_collections" (
  "data_collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data collection */,
  "data_collection_name" TEXT /* Name of the data collection */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data collection */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_collections_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("data_source_id")
)
